title: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Chief Engineer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority website. The last date to submit the application form is 23-06-2026.

basic_details.job_title: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Chief Engineer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority website. The last date to submit the application form is 23-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits and relaxation details.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognized university/Institution, Fifteen years experience in Executive cadre in planning / Construction / Design / Maintenance preferably of Port and Marine structures in an Industrial / Commercial / Government Undertakings
qualification.details: Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognized university/Institution. Fifteen years of experience in an Executive cadre in planning, construction, design, or maintenance, preferably of Port and Marine structures in an Industrial, Commercial, or Government Undertaking.

selection_process: Selection by merit Benchmark in overall grading in the APARs not below Very Good
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Chief Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Chief Engineer post is 23rd June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Chief Engineer position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognized university or institution. This is a key requirement for the role.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are needed for the Chief Engineer post?
faq.answer: A minimum of fifteen years of experience in an Executive cadre is required. This experience should be in areas like planning, construction, design, or maintenance of port and marine structures.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Chief Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Chief Engineer position will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 100000 to Rs. 260000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Chief Engineer jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Chief Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Chief Engineer announced in this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Chief Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on merit. Additionally, candidates must have an overall grading in their APARs not below 'Very Good'.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It contains all detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Chief Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Deputation. Candidates applying should be aware of this employment arrangement.
